channel.description: The channel this message was sent to. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.chat.channel record.

replyRef.description: (optional) A reference to the message this is replying to.

messageRef.description: (optional) A reference to another message, such as a quoted or forwarded message.

content.description: The text content of the message.

facets.description: (optional) Rich text annotations for the message content. Annotations are indexed by UTF-8 byte offsets into the content string.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when this message was created.

main.description: Record declaring a chat message. Written to the sender's repository by the AppView.

root.description: The root message of the thread. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.chat.message record.

parent.description: The direct parent message being replied to. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.chat.message record.

replyRef.description: A reply reference linking to the root and parent messages of a thread.

message.description: The referenced message. Must resolve to a systems.gmstn.chat.message record.
